mock_corpus_claims.claim: New employees must create a password of at least 8 characters for their company account.
Employees should use LastPass to store and manage their work credentials.
Your laptop will be set up with Windows Defender as the primary endpoint security tool.
MFA setup is optional during your first 30 days while you get settled in.
IT onboarding support is available Monday to Friday during office hours.
You can access internal tools like email and the project tracker without VPN from trusted home networks.
Personal laptops may be used for remote work as long as they have up-to-date antivirus software.
Split tunnelling is available on request for employees who experience bandwidth issues.
Remote employees are encouraged to use a dedicated workspace at home.
The company VPN is GlobalProtect.
Security incidents should be reported to your line manager in the first instance.
The security team can be reached at security@company.com for incident reporting.
Policy exceptions may be granted for up to 180 days at the discretion of the CISO.
Employees should attempt basic remediation steps before escalating a suspected incident.
All security incidents must be logged in the incident tracking portal.
Full-disk encryption is recommended but not mandatory for personally-owned devices enrolled in MDM.
Personally-owned devices must be enrolled in Mobile Device Management before accessing internal systems.
Device enrolment requests are submitted via the IT service desk.
macOS devices must have FileVault encryption enabled.
Passwords must be changed every 60 days.
All company data must be stored on approved cloud storage platforms.
Employees are responsible for keeping their work devices secure when working outside the office.
